hook.summary: High-intensity combat gameplay featuring Guan Yu with flashy skill effects and high combo counts.
hook.visual_action: Guan Yu attacks a group of soldiers with a polearm, displaying damage numbers and a combo counter.
hook.voiceover_transcript: Chiêm ngưỡng đồ họa sắc nét tại Hoàn Mỹ Tam Quốc với võ tướng Quan Vũ dũng mãnh.

scene_flow: Continuous combat gameplay showing a high-combo attack sequence with Guan Yu.
Display of ultimate skill with explosive fire effects and massive damage numbers.
Cinematic 3D render transition showing a character performing a whirlwind attack.
Final promotional screen with gift codes and app store download links.
cta_text: Tải ngay trên Google Play App Store
audience_proxy: Male gamers in Vietnam interested in Three Kingdoms action RPGs and high-fidelity mobile graphics.
